metadata.purpose: Proxy tasks for whether a caregiver/operator can identify Parker review-state buckets and safe next actions, including the lifecycle of a local card grounded in one reviewed public-audio metadata episode.
metadata.caveat: Not a caregiver usability study, not human-graded evidence, no raw audio, and no private family data.

tasks.title: Identify a staged reminder waiting for patient confirmation
tasks.prompt: Which local action is still waiting for confirmation, and what can the caregiver safely do next?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Reminder: water tomato plants — staged; confirm or cancel before execution.

raw_chat_only.visible_summary: Transcript says: remind me to water tomato plants.

tasks.title: Identify a queued local family-message row
tasks.prompt: Which message is queued locally after patient confirmation, and what is the next safe caregiver action?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Queued local message to Sarah; approve locally or cancel. No sender exists.

raw_chat_only.visible_summary: Transcript says: tell Sarah the physio visit went well.

tasks.title: Identify an approved-local row that still must not send externally
tasks.prompt: Which message has caregiver approval, and does approval mean it has been externally sent?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Approved local message to Sarah; still on this machine, no outbound send path.

raw_chat_only.visible_summary: Transcript mentions approval, but not current outbox state.

tasks.title: Identify a cancelled action in the audit trail
tasks.prompt: Which item was cancelled, who cancelled it, and can it still execute?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Changed my mind: earlier draft cancelled by patient before execution.

tasks.title: Identify a review-only non-response escalation candidate
tasks.prompt: Which item is a non-response candidate, and should it notify family automatically?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Non-response candidate: info severity, review-only, no contacts notified.

raw_chat_only.visible_summary: Transcript does not reveal resurface counts or escalation candidate state.

tasks.title: Identify the review UI safety contract before acting
tasks.prompt: Can the caregiver see the no-send and healthcare-adjacent boundaries before pressing action buttons?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Demo safety contract: no outbound sends, no medical advice/med changes/purchases/emergency replacement, no private credentials displayed.

raw_chat_only.visible_summary: A chat transcript alone does not expose the review-page safety contract.

tasks.title: Identify a user-confirmed local research card that still needs review
tasks.prompt: Which research card was explicitly user-confirmed, what stayed local, and which caregiver controls are available?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Local research card: Tell me about Michael Jackson; user-confirmed interpretation, no external source fetched; mark complete or cancel.

raw_chat_only.visible_summary: Transcript shows the repaired Michael Jackson question but not whether a local family card was explicitly created.

provenance.redistribution_status: sanitized metadata and ASR hypotheses only; raw public audio remains in Operations

audio_evidence.source_transcript: please give me information on michael jackson
asr_hypotheses: Please give me information on Martin Jackson.
Please give me information on Michael Jackson.

scenario_intent.scenario: wake-confirmed public factoid repair followed by explicit local family-visibility consent
scenario_intent.active_context: no live fetch or external action context

weak_current_before.result: repaired read-only answer ended with no caregiver follow-up state

strong_oracle_consensus.result: repair the person entity, answer read-only, ask separately for family visibility, then expose a ready local card with complete/cancel only

audio_evidence.expected_confirmation_or_action: Option 2 resolves Michael Jackson; a separate explicit yes creates one ready local card. Caregiver complete/cancel stay local and perform no research or send.

tasks.title: Identify a completed local research card as terminal history
tasks.prompt: Which research card was completed, who completed it, and can it still fetch, send, or transition?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Completed local research card: Tell me about Michael Jackson; completed by caregiver; terminal and still no external source fetched.

raw_chat_only.visible_summary: Transcript cannot distinguish an offered handoff from a completed local card or identify the completing caregiver.

provenance.redistribution_status: sanitized metadata and ASR hypotheses only; raw public audio remains in Operations

audio_evidence.source_transcript: please give me information on michael jackson
asr_hypotheses: Please give me information on Martin Jackson.
Please give me information on Michael Jackson.

scenario_intent.scenario: synthetic terminal completion of the user-confirmed card grounded in the public audio metadata episode

weak_current_before.result: raw chat could not prove that the local card was created, completed, or terminal

strong_oracle_consensus.result: show completed_by/completed_at and no remaining controls; completion performs no fetch, send, or external action

audio_evidence.expected_confirmation_or_action: After the separate user handoff confirmation, caregiver completion changes ready to completed exactly once; the terminal card has no controls or external authority.

tasks.title: Identify a cancelled local research card as terminal history
tasks.prompt: Which research card was cancelled, who cancelled it, and can it still fetch, send, or transition?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Cancelled local research card: Tell me about Michael Jackson; cancelled by caregiver; terminal and no external source fetched.

raw_chat_only.visible_summary: Transcript cannot prove whether the handoff card was cancelled or whether any family-visible state remains.

provenance.redistribution_status: sanitized metadata and ASR hypotheses only; raw public audio remains in Operations

audio_evidence.source_transcript: please give me information on michael jackson
asr_hypotheses: Please give me information on Martin Jackson.
Please give me information on Michael Jackson.

scenario_intent.scenario: synthetic terminal cancellation of the user-confirmed card grounded in the public audio metadata episode

weak_current_before.result: raw chat could not distinguish dismissing an offer from cancelling an already-created local card

strong_oracle_consensus.result: show cancelled_by/cancelled_at and no remaining controls; cancellation prevents later completion and performs no external action

audio_evidence.expected_confirmation_or_action: After the separate user handoff confirmation, caregiver cancellation changes ready to cancelled exactly once; the terminal card cannot complete, fetch, or send.

tasks.title: Identify a completed research card whose query text was redacted
tasks.prompt: Was the sensitive research query removed while preserving enough non-sensitive lifecycle audit to understand what happened?

parker_review_ui.visible_summary: Research query redacted by caregiver after completion; query and selected interpretation are absent, while completed/redacted actor-time audit and local-only risk remain visible.

raw_chat_only.visible_summary: A transcript retains the original query and cannot prove that persisted query text was redacted while lifecycle audit remained.

provenance.redistribution_status: sanitized metadata and ASR hypotheses only; raw public audio remains in Operations

audio_evidence.source_transcript: please give me information on michael jackson
asr_hypotheses: Please give me information on Martin Jackson.
Please give me information on Michael Jackson.

scenario_intent.scenario: synthetic post-completion redaction of a user-confirmed card grounded in the public audio metadata episode
scenario_intent.active_context: local caregiver privacy maintenance only; no external action

weak_current_before.result: the local card and any separately consented linked repair event retained query-bearing text indefinitely after completion

strong_oracle_consensus.result: clear card query, selected interpretation, and linked consented repair transcript/hypothesis/choice text manually or after the bounded retention window while preserving status, provenance/risk, completion audit, and redaction audit

audio_evidence.expected_confirmation_or_action: After explicit handoff consent and local completion, configured caregiver authentication plus irreversible confirmation clears card query, selected interpretation, and linked consented repair-event text exactly once using authenticated actor/server time; completed actor/time and redaction actor/time/reason remain, with no controls or external authority.
